The device is positioned in the foreground with natural daylight lighting, casting soft highlights on its surface. The screen displays a split view with three distinct panels: a map on the left, a sonar readout in the center, and a side-imaging or down-imaging view on the right. The control buttons on the right side of the device are visible, with a finger pressing one of the navigation buttons. A compact fish finder is positioned on the textured black deck of a boat, angled slightly toward the viewer. The device rests on a flat, dark surface with visible water droplets and subtle reflections, surrounded by boat components including a black and silver motor mount and coiled cables. In the background, calm greenish water is visible beyond the boat’s edge, with a thin orange trim lining the gunwale. The scene is lit by bright, natural sunlight, casting soft shadows and highlighting the glossy and matte textures of the boat’s surface. The fish finder is shown in a real-world, outdoor setting, integrated into the fishing environment.
